events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the impulse line taps are installed backward for their service (gas taps below pipe, liquid taps on top), which is the classic API RP 551 violation — it traps condensate in gas legs and traps vapor in liquid legs, corrupting the DP reading even if the transmitter itself is healthy. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, condition `installed-defective/non-compliant/degraded`, with corrective actions to isolate, drain/vent, re-slope per correct tap orientation, and re-verify calibration before trusting the loop again.
